message:
Replace u64-as-u8 casts in fscrypt transport golden assertions

Extract golden_u8 helper using u8::try_from so the pedantic clippy
cast_possible_truncation gate stays green. The fscrypt legacy transport
golden fields all fit in u8; the helper panics loudly if a future
regression widens them. Unblocks workspace-wide cargo clippy -- -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
